raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/2024 We received a call from what looked like our card company stating that they were the fraud department. Telling us of the fraud charges. Having them taken care of, but in reality they were keeping us on the phone, they were in our account as they know all of my purchases. Asking many questions, asking things we should have never told them, doing things with our phones to have our calls forwarded to a number they had set up so we would not get notification of the transactions they were placing. 

XX/XX/2024 I had figured out what was going on and called the credit card company to explain, they have locked the account, issued new cards, and removed the fraudulent charges. I talking with them, I just wish they would listen as I told them that they were in my account and were able to tell me a lot of stuff, maybe even changed all of my security questions. I also was able to figure out that they had our calls transfer to a special phone number so they could verify the transactions. All of this in now taken care of. 

We went to our police department and reported, bank also
